testcase.name: verifyEmptySearchShowsNoResultsMessage

failure.message: Search result page should be displayed for an empty search. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Search result page should be displayed for an empty search. expected [true] but found [false] at com.srm.ninjashop.tests.ProductTests.verifyEmptySearchShowsNoResultsMessage(ProductTests.java:40) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:842) ... Removed 16 stack frames
